name: Coco Chanel

acts.description: Worked as a Nazi intelligence agent (codename 'Westminster') during WWII occupation of Paris
Used Nazi Aryanization laws to try to seize business assets from Jewish business partners
Romantic relationship with Nazi officer Baron Hans Günther von Dincklage throughout the occupation

behavior_summary: Collaborated with Nazi occupiers in Paris, worked as a Nazi spy, and used Aryanization laws to steal her Jewish business partners' assets. The brand has never fully reckoned with this.

art.summary: Liberated women's fashion from corsets. Created some of the most iconic garments and fragrances in history. Essentially invented modern fashion.

accountability_events: 1945 arrested and questioned, released without charges
Fled to Switzerland with Nazi lover

verdict.blurb: She freed women from corsets and worked for the Nazis. She tried to steal her Jewish business partners' company using the Aryanization laws. The little black dress and the spy file exist simultaneously in the archive. The House of Chanel has never given a full accounting.
